asset_name: Blizzard VFX — Severe gust particle strip
shared_properties: Particle cells keep the 16x16px frame size and diagonal motion language established by art_000005.
Core palette fields remain fixed at primary #111111, background #000000, and accent #FFFFFF.
The strip remains suitable for pooled particle spawning in large weather bursts.
differences: Flake streaks lengthen and density rises to communicate late-winter and major-storm pressure.
Brighter white bursts increase the sense of wind shear without obscuring all gameplay anchors.
Frame cadence rises to 16fps so the gust feels more aggressive than the light snow baseline.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the monochrome blizzard mood, Viking settlement silhouettes, and snow density targets.

reference_images.label: jarl_of_blizzard_village_scene
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the settlement composition, building spacing, and whiteout layering over the frozen basin.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: TextureAtlas particle strip used by the severe-weather spawner when blizzard pressure reaches high intensity.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/art_000006.png with the weather atlas family and swap it in for high-intensity storm states.
runtime_notes: Activate this strip only when severe gust thresholds are reached so the visual hierarchy stays clear.
Keep spawn pivots and particle scale aligned with art_000005 to preserve weather-system tuning.
Blend the gust strip below the whiteout mask and above world gameplay sprites.

context.usage: Escalated snowfall effect used during severe storms, raid pressure, and late-round whiteout moments.

shape.silhouette: Dense diagonal snow streaks with longer white slashes and clustered gust bursts.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet is exactly 128x16px with 8 frames of 16x16px and 0px spacing.
The strip reads as denser and faster than art_000005 without producing opaque full-frame patches.
Bright streaks remain inside the 16x16px cell bounds so atlas sampling stays clean.
